meaning: n.[生化] 纤维醇,纤维糖,肌糖
examples: Inositol is needed for normal nerve function.
Ingredients like taurine, guarana, and inositol are natural substances.
The vitamin inositol could obviously stimulate the growth of mycelium.
Lorcaserin was more selective in receptor-stimulated inositol phosphate accumulation in the same cells.
